compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect SC coverage validation gate in sprint Phase 1
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update project documentation to reflect the new SC coverage validation gate added to sprint Phase 1.
**Why**: replan-observability.md and CLAUDE.md must be updated so future agents and operators have accurate awareness of the new gate and any new named agents.
**Scope**:
- IN: replan-observability.md Valid Types table (add sc_coverage trigger type with description and usage context), CLAUDE.md Named-agent dispatch table (update if S1 created named agent definitions), any other existing docs that describe sprint Phase 1 flow in a way that would become stale
- OUT: All SKILL.md changes (S2a, S2b), prompt file content (S1), test infrastructure (S2b)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, replan-observability.md includes sc_coverage as a valid REPLAN_TRIGGER type with description and usage context
- When this story is complete, if S1 created named agent definitions, the CLAUDE.md Named-agent dispatch table includes the SC coverage agents with correct model and dispatcher
- When this story is complete, no existing documentation describes sprint Phase 1 in a way that would mislead agents about the new gate step

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test
